scene_01_temple_rain_martial_arts.title: Temple rain martial-arts combat
scene_01_temple_rain_martial_arts.style: cinematic wuxia realism with rain and temple architecture
scene_01_temple_rain_martial_arts.story_function: Fenshou and Shuangji fight in close-range fist-and-foot combat, using the temple environment as the fight escalates.
major_beats: close-range fist-and-foot combat
use temple corridors, stairs, pillars, eaves, rooftops, slick wet surfaces, tiles, and wood structures
fight can escalate onto rooftops
one side may be knocked into and break temple structures or rooms
final temple-stage collision destroys the temple
no clear winner
final temple image is obscured by smoke, dust, and rain

transition_01_temple_to_snow_mountain.title: Dusty rain to snowy fog
transition_01_temple_to_snow_mountain.transition_logic: The obscured smoky, dusty, rainy temple view transitions into snowy fog.
transition_01_temple_to_snow_mountain.style_shift: Cinematic rain realism shifts toward ink-wash / water-ink style.

scene_02_snow_mountain_ink_weapon_combat.title: Snow mountain weapon combat
scene_02_snow_mountain_ink_weapon_combat.story_function: The same two fighters continue combat with spear and long blade in a snow mountain environment.
major_beats: same two fighters
spear and long blade weapon combat
use snow mountain terrain, fog, cliffs, ridges, and whiteout visibility
high-end cinematic reveal ideas may be explored later, including hawk-eye follow and breaking through fog
fight escalates until avalanche / mountain collapse

transition_02_avalanche_to_offshore_plat.title: Avalanche mass to line-work platform world
transition_02_avalanche_to_offshore_plat.transition_logic: Camera follows a collapsing snow chunk as it transforms from ink-wash mass into line work.
transition_02_avalanche_to_offshore_plat.style_shift: Water-ink style shifts into sketch / line-drawing style.

scene_03_offshore_platform_sketch_kaiju_.title: Offshore platform kaiju vs mech escalation
scene_03_offshore_platform_sketch_kaiju_.style: sketch / line-drawing style around a sea platform
scene_03_offshore_platform_sketch_kaiju_.story_function: The conflict mutates into giant-scale combat near an offshore drilling platform.
major_beats: offshore drilling platform over the sea
one fighter transforms into a giant kaiju-like monster
the other fighter transforms into a giant mech
they fight around and in the sea near the drilling platform
platform explodes
both sides fire large-scale energy attacks
huge explosion becomes the transition

transition_03_explosion_to_outer_space.title: Huge explosion to outer space
transition_03_explosion_to_outer_space.transition_logic: The platform-scale explosion expands into an outer-space / abstract visual field.
transition_03_explosion_to_outer_space.style_shift: Sketch / line-drawing style shifts into abstract cosmic imagery.

scene_04_outer_space_abstract_cosmic_man.title: Outer space abstract cosmic manifestation
scene_04_outer_space_abstract_cosmic_man.story_function: Both sides display Fa Tian Xiang Di scale / cosmic manifestation as the ending-stage conflict.
major_beats: transition into outer space
visual style becomes abstract
both display Fa Tian Xiang Di scale / cosmic manifestation
this is the ending stage

scene_01_shot_ladder.status: closed combat branch with locked edit candidate
scene_01_shot_ladder.notes: Combat core is currently represented by SHOT-02-V018-speed-1p18x; final_master remains false.

scene_01_shot_ladder.content: Use corridors, stairs, pillars, eaves, rooftop access, rain-slick surfaces, tiles, and wood structures.
scene_01_shot_ladder.notes: This shot should expand beyond clean close combat into environmental interaction, without jumping directly to full temple destruction.

scene_01_shot_ladder.content: One side crashes into and breaks temple structures / rooms / roof edges.
scene_01_shot_ladder.notes: Escalates architecture damage after SHOT-03 establishes environmental combat.

scene_01_shot_ladder.role: temple-destruction climax and obscured transition setup
scene_01_shot_ladder.content: No-winner collision, temple destruction, dust/smoke + rain occlusion, transition bridge to snow mountain.
scene_01_shot_ladder.notes: Scene 1 climax and visual bridge into the snow mountain sequence.
